commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b620bb04fee9572e57f06980326d2502dce3739e)
commands.review_summary:
The branch extends inbound metadata stripping for additional sentinels and non-fenced context, then changes Control UI text extraction to strip metadata from assistant/non-user display paths and hide custom display:false messages.

PR surface: Source +66, Tests +2. Total +68 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch defect from source: the PR makes a line exactly 'Current message:' start a non-fenced block and drops following nonblank lines. The original Feishu/Dashboard leak is plausible from the linked issue and code paths, but this PR does not provide a live reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs author or maintainer follow-up rather than repair automation because the patch has an overbroad stripping defect and the external PR still lacks real behavior proof.

target.title: fix: inbound metadata leakage — missing sentinels and display gaps
target.body:
## Summary

Inbound metadata leakage into user-visible chat

## Changes

- `src/auto-reply/reply/strip-inbound-meta.ts`: Fix applied. See commit diff for details.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Inbound metadata leakage into user-visible chat

Real environment tested: ubuntu-24.04, Node 24, branch fix/issue-93966-metadata-leakage.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/strip-inbound-meta.test.ts
  node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json

Evidence after fix:

```
$ node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/strip-inbound-meta.test.ts
 RUN  v4.1.8

 ✓ src/auto-reply/reply/strip-inbound-meta.test.ts (35 tests)

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  35 passed (35)
   Duration  1.21s

$ node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json
(no type errors)
```

Observed result after fix: All 35 unit tests for strip-inbound-meta pass. Type check passes cleanly across all extension projects. No regressions.

What was not tested: End-to-end with real multi-channel credentials (requires platform-specific setup not available in this environment).

Closes: #93966

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
